entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Indian pearl millet named landraces conserved at the ICRISAT Genebank

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country of origin for the pearl millet landraces

entities.name: LATITUDE
entities.description: Geographic coordinate range from 8.8oN to 30.90oN affecting adaptation

entities.name: CLIMATE
entities.description: Environmental conditions at collection sites affecting adaptation

entities.name: ADAPTATION PATTERN
entities.description: The way landraces adapt to their environment and its association with latitude and climate

entities.name: GENETIC POTENTIAL
entities.description: The inherent genetic capacity of the landraces for agronomic performance

entities.name: HIERARCHICAL CLUSTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: Statistical method used to group accessions based on agronomic traits

entities.name: EARLY FLOWERING
entities.description: Agronomic trait characterized by early flowering time

entities.name: LATE FLOWERING
entities.description: Agronomic trait characterized by late flowering time

entities.name: TILLERING
entities.description: Agronomic trait referring to the production of side shoots

entities.name: SHORT HEIGHT
entities.description: Agronomic trait referring to reduced plant height

entities.name: SEED IRON CONTENT
entities.description: Nutritional trait referring to the amount of iron in the seeds

entities.name: ZINC CONTENT
entities.description: Nutritional trait referring to the amount of zinc in the seeds

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW RESISTANCE
entities.description: Disease resistance trait against downy mildew

entities.name: SEED PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: Nutritional trait referring to the amount of protein in the seeds

entities.name: RUST RESISTANCE
entities.description: Disease resistance trait against rust

entities.name: IP 13465
entities.description: Specific pearl millet accession identified as a source for early flowering and short height

entities.name: IP 15273
entities.description: Specific pearl millet accession identified as a source for high tillering, iron, zinc, and downy mildew resistance

entities.name: IP 3531
entities.description: Specific pearl millet accession identified as a source for high seed protein, downy mildew, and rust resistance
